items.title: Kyle Shanahan: 49ers may be gone longer for Mexico game than for Australia game
items.summary: The 49ers ended up with not one but two international games in 2026 — one in Australia and one in Mexico.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: David Hussey steps down as Victoria's head of men's cricket
items.summary: Set to take on a role with a new global venture Cricket Victoria is due to launch
